data.name: Stella Magical Idol
data.detailed_description:
The game

Get into Stella's game to help her get some dick n' dash through the story mode with funny and horny puzzles or her very rare but exciting Lovinder app dates which you´ll unlock by completing a memory game.

Stella is a really busy girl who tries to balance her idol life which consists in dealing with concerts, fans, recordings and her workaholic manager Carlos and her recently acquired magical shojo life in which she needs to beat the shit out of enemy leaders and their minions, saving innocents and not very innocents citizens in the process, and after all this at the end of the day Stella needs to find the way to get laid. 

There are 12 main stories each with 3 puzzles that you need to solve by dragging scenes, characters and objects in the slots in order to get the story going and get some lewd rewards at the end of the last chapter in each main story.

The minigame in Stella Magical Idol is a memory game with a twist, between the pair of cards there is an impostor be careful of finding HIM because you will lose all your progress, once you beat the minigame you will get a reward that you can use to beat something else... wink wink!!!

Finish the game to unlock all these rewards:

  • 14 animated and voice acted story scenes

  • 12 static date scenes.

  • A surprisingly unknown number of concept art

And remember you can get more content of our favorite girl by supporting us in our social media, love you all and get laid tonight!!!

data.short_description: In Stella Magical Idol you need to help the incredible Idol & Magical shojo Stella find the time for her "special" hobby by solving funny and horny puzzles.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Microsoft Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Onboard
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
